message:
perf(ready): fast-path SQL limit push-down when no external dependencies exist

Add has_external_dependencies() existence-check query to skip the
expensive external-blocker resolution loop entirely when no external
deps are present, allowing --limit to be pushed directly into the
SQL query for significantly faster br ready on projects without
cross-repo dependencies.

Also fixes:
- create: clone parsed fields before import retry loop to prevent
  field consumption on first iteration (would panic on retry)
- create: remove dead standalone ID-generation block superseded
  by inline generation
- sync: broaden backup_before_export to cover JSONL files outside
  .beads/ directory, not just those inside it
- stats: remove unused BufRead, BufReader, Stdio imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
